data.body: FINAL STATE (Round-12, 2026-06-29): ALL 3 epics now signed PASS. 7d43 BLOCKâ†’PASS (advisory 15â†’9 across rounds); b744 PASSâ†’PASS (29â†’15); d251 BLOCK(1)â†’PASS (cleared the seam/credential/webhook BLOCK, then a 2nd-round adapter-source + concurrency + BSL BLOCK, then a 3rd-round adapter-message + concurrency-lock + backfill-cursor BLOCK â€” all resolved at the epic level). d251 took 4 review rounds because the epic-level finder reads the EPIC body, so child-only AC fixes had to be mirrored into the epic description to clear epic-level BLOCKs. Remaining advisories on all three are the fine-grained convergence tail (the exact non-convergence phenomenon 7d43 itself is built to suppress). All edited tickets pass check-ac; experiments durably recorded in this log.
